testcase.name: Manufacturer Model — Independent Tab Audit Fields @manfModelAudit › TC-001: Navigate to nexstar-uat.trsrentelco.com and submit login credentials
testcase.system-out:
[2026-06-04T12:15:10.554Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] Navigating to https://nexstar-uat.trsrentelco.com [2026-06-04T12:15:16.136Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] Clicking "Login to UAT" button [2026-06-04T12:15:16.136Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] clickElement: locator('button:has-text("Login to UAT"), a:has-text("Login to UAT"), [data-testid*="login-uat"], span:has-text("Login to UAT")').first() [2026-06-04T12:15:23.375Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] waitForPageLoad: networkidle timed-out, continuing [2026-06-04T12:15:24.394Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] takeScreenshot: TC-001-after-login-to-uat [2026-06-04T12:15:24.679Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] Entering email [2026-06-04T12:15:24.760Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] takeScreenshot: TC-001-email-filled [2026-06-04T12:15:24.849Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] clickElement: locator('input[type="submit"][value="Next"], button:has-text("Next"), input[value="Next"]').first() [2026-06-04T12:15:28.971Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] Entering password [2026-06-04T12:15:28.989Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] takeScreenshot: TC-001-password-filled [2026-06-04T12:15:31.119Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] "Stay signed in?" detected — clicking Yes [2026-06-04T12:15:34.955Z] [ManfModelLoginPage] takeScreenshot: TC-001-after-credential-submit
[[ATTACHMENT|artifacts\manf-model-audit-Manufactu-dbf3a-nd-submit-login-credentials-chromium\test-finished-1.png]]
